seo.title: Decoupled Filament + Nuxt starter
seo.description: A page built from reusable blocks in Filament and rendered by Nuxt UI.

data.title: Author in Filament, render with Nuxt UI
data.headline: Decoupled CMS
data.description: This whole section is a "page_section" block. Every field you see was set in the CMS and delivered as JSON — edit it in Filament and the frontend updates with no code change.

features.title: Reusable blocks
features.description: Each block maps 1:1 to a Nuxt UI component.

features.title: Detachable
features.description: Run integrated with Laravel or as a static Netlify site.

features.title: Type-safe contract
features.description: DTOs generate the frontend TypeScript types.

data.title: Add blocks without touching the frontend
data.description: Run `php artisan make:block Hero`, drop a Hero.vue in the frontend, and the new block appears in the page builder.
